questions.question: What is the primary purpose of the MediaPlayer class in Android?
options: A) To play audio and video files
D) To manage broadcast life cycle
questions.explanation: The MediaPlayer class is used to play audio and video files in Android.

questions.question: What is the TextToSpeech class used for in Android?
questions.explanation: The TextToSpeech class is used to read text aloud in Android.

questions.question: Which of the following is a correct way to play a video file in Android?
questions.explanation: To play a video file, you need to call startVideo() instead of start().

questions.question: What is the Intent.ACTION_PLAYSTORE intent used for in Android?
options: A) To play audio and video files
D) To open the Play Store
questions.explanation: The Intent.ACTION_PLAYSTORE intent is used to open the Play Store.

questions.question: Which of the following is a benefit of using the TextToSpeech class in Android?
options: A) It is only used for audio files
B) It is only used for reading text aloud
C) It can be used for both audio and video files
D) It is only used for text input
questions.explanation: The TextToSpeech class can be used to read text aloud, making it a convenient method for accessibility features.
